title: Boss Checklist DivineRPG Addon
description: Adds DivineRPG bosses to Boss Checklist
body:

Need a server? Kinetic Hosting comes to help! Use code: [DIMAS](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=624)

# Adds DivineRPG bosses to Boss Checklist mod.
Adds all the bosses from DivineRPG to checklist.





DivineRPG and Boss Checklist need to be installed.
